name: TenantForge
summary: Control plane for database-per-tenant SaaS on Neon: provision an isolated project per customer, route connections, orchestrate fleet-wide migrations, and manage tenant lifecycle (suspend/offboard/residency).

env.name: DATABASE_URL
env.description: Control-plane registry Postgres (tenant metadata only — not tenant data).

env.name: NEON_API_KEY
env.description: Neon API key used to provision/delete a project per tenant.

env.name: NEON_ORG_ID
env.description: Neon organization id (the account is org-scoped) for project operations.

env.name: NEON_API_BASE_URL
env.description: Override for the Neon API base URL (defaults to the public API).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND
env.description: Where per-tenant connection secrets live: neon-pg (default, AES-256-GCM in the control-plane DB) or vault (HashiCorp Vault KV v2).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_SECRET_KEY
env.description: Passphrase that encrypts per-tenant connection secrets at rest (AES-256-GCM); separate from DATABASE_URL's credential. Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=neon-pg.

env.name: VAULT_ADDR
env.description: HashiCorp Vault server URL (use TLS). Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=vault.

env.name: VAULT_TOKEN
env.description: HashiCorp Vault token. Required when TENANTFORGE_SECRET_BACKEND=vault.

env.name: VAULT_KV_MOUNT
env.description: Vault KV v2 mount path for the vault backend (default: secret).

env.name: VAULT_PATH_PREFIX
env.description: Path prefix under the Vault mount; secrets land at {prefix}/{tenantId} (default: tenantforge).

env.name: VAULT_NAMESPACE
env.description: Vault Enterprise namespace for the vault backend, if any.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_RETENTION_DAYS
env.description: Days an archived (offboarding) tenant is retained before purge-expired deletes it (default 30).

env.name: TENANTFORGE_ALLOWED_REGIONS
env.description: Comma-separated allow-list of regions tenants may be provisioned in (residency enforcement); empty = all known regions.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_HTTP_TOKEN
env.description: Bearer token required to run the HTTP control-plane API.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL when calling the HTTP control-plane API.

env.name: TENANTFORGE_QUEUE_POLL_MS
env.description: Async lifecycle worker poll interval (ms) between drains of the Postgres-backed queue (default 5000).
